steps.title: Identify the cause-effect relationship
steps.content: The measurements revealed concerning rotation; city officials then closed the area around the tower. The blank connects these two events as cause and consequence.

steps.title: Apply the transition to the choices
steps.content: 'As a result' directly expresses that the closure is a consequence of discovering the rotation. The other choices signal comparison or introduce examples, neither fitting the causal link. That matches choice B — B is correct.
